overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character walking along a dark, atmospheric path toward Hogwarts castle at night. The character crosses a wooden bridge and passes through an enclosed stone-walled path before reaching a lit signpost at a junction.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path leading to wooden bridge over water

events.description: character steps onto the wooden bridge crossing the river
character exits the bridge onto the dirt path on the other side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a forest path and crossing a wooden bridge over a river

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple towers silhouetted against the dark sky
wooden plank bridge with railings crossing over dark water
dark water flowing beneath the bridge
simple wooden fence running alongside the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest path with Hogwarts castle visible in the distant center. The character walks forward, approaching and crossing a wooden bridge over a river. The environment is enclosed by trees with mixed lighting from the night sky and distant lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed dirt path flanked by stone walls and dense trees

agents.ego_description: walking along a winding dirt path bordered by stone walls and pine trees

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the path
low stone wall running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the path becomes enclosed by stone walls on both sides. The character continues walking along the winding dirt trail as Hogwarts castle shifts to the left side of the frame. The dense vegetation and walls create a narrow, intimate corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open path junction with directional signpost and view of distant castle

events.description: character slows and pauses briefly at the signpost before continuing past it

agents.ego_description: approaching a lit wooden signpost at a path junction, pausing momentarily to look at the directional signs before continuing past it

entered.detail: tall wooden post with multiple directional signs and a lit lantern on top
warm lights from a distant settlement or camp visible down the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The path opens up as the character approaches a junction marked by a tall wooden signpost with a lit lantern. Hogwarts castle becomes more prominent on the left as the stone walls fall away. The character pauses briefly at the signpost before continuing past it toward the distant lights visible down the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark forest trail that transitions from an open woodland path into a narrow stone corridor before opening up at a lit junction. It begins with the character walking toward the distant silhouette of Hogwarts castle, crossing a wooden bridge over a river under the dim light of the night sky. As the bridge is left behind, the environment shifts into a winding dirt trail enclosed by high stone walls and dense vegetation, causing the castle to drift toward the left of the frame. The scene then expands as the walls fall away, leading the character toward a tall wooden signpost illuminated by a glowing lantern. Finally, the camera lingers briefly at this junction before moving past the light toward the distant glow of the castle's spires.
